card.name: Daredevil

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Defender. Martial Artist.

card.property: Superhuman Senses — Action: Play the top card of the SENSE deck as if it were in your hand (paying its cost). Forced Interrupt: When a [[SENSE]] upgrade would leave play, place it on the bottom of the [[SENSE]] deck instead.

alternate.name: Matt Murdock
alternate.property: Matt Murdock begins the game with a [[SENSE]] deck. (See rulebook p. 26.) Forced Interrupt: When a [[SENSE] upgrade would leave play, place it on the bottom of the [[SENSE] deck instead.

card.name: Acute Tactility

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Sense. Superpower.

card.property: Attach to an enemy or scheme. Interrupt: When you defeat attached enemy or remove the last threat from attached scheme, discard this card → ready your identity.

card.name: Enhanced Olfaction

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Sense. Superpower.

card.property: Attach to an enemy or scheme. Interrupt: When you defeat attached enemy or remove the last threat from attached scheme, discard this card → reduce the cost of the next card you play this phase by 2.

card.name: Heightened Hearing

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Sense. Superpower.

card.property: Attach to an enemy. Hero Interrupt (defense): When attached enemy attacks, discard this card → that enemy gets -3 ATK for that attack. (You become the target of that attack.)

card.name: Radar Sense

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Sense. Superpower.

card.property: Attach to an enemy. Response (attack): After you attack attached enemy, discard this card → deal 3 damage to that enemy.

property.name: Quote
property.value: The accident that cost Matt his eyesight gave him a new, radar-like sense.

card.name: Superior Taste

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Sense. Superpower.

card.property: Attach to a scheme. Response (thwart): After you thwart attached scheme, discard this card → remove 2 threat from that scheme.

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Defender. Martial Artist.

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Forced Interrupt (Hero): When Elektra would take consequential damage, Daredevil takes that damage instead.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I don't need your protection, Matt."

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy. For each upgrade attached to that enemy, you may deal 1 additional damage to it.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "No further questions, punk." -Daredevil

property.name: Text
property.value: Alter-Ego Action (thwart): You may choose any upgrade from the [[SENSE]] deck and play it, ignoring its resource cost. (Do not shuffle.) Remove 2 threat from a scheme.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Tell us everything."—Matt Murdock

property.name: Text
property.value: Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. For each upgrade attached to that scheme, you may remove 1 additional threat from it.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Thump-Thump Thump-Thump Thump-Thump Thump-Thump Thump-Thump Thump-Thump

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to each enemy for each upgrade attached to that enemy (3 damage instead if Daredevil has the [[AERIAL]] trait).

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I cannot see the light. So I will be the light. I am Daredevil, and I am not afraid." -Daredevil

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Attorney. Persona.

property.name: Text
property.value: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Foggy Nelson → remove 2 threat from a scheme.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Everything's okay now, Matt! Ol' Fog is on it!"

property.name: Text
property.value: Action: Exhaust Karen Page → shuffle 1 Daredevil card from your discard pile into your deck. If you are in alter-ego form, draw 1 card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "What would you boys do without me?"

property.name: Text
property.value: Response: After an [[ATTORNEY]] character or support defeats a side scheme, confuse an enemy.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Let's see them pull off their heist with their vehicle impounded." -Matt Murdock

card.name: Sister Maggie
card.property: Matt Murdock gets +3 REC. Response: After you recover, discard a status card from your identity.

property.name: Quote
property.value: As both a Catholic nun and Matt's mother, Sister Maggie often nurses her son back to health.

card.name: Daredevil's Billy Club

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Item. Weapon.

card.property: Restricted. Daredevil gets +1 ATK. Hero Action: Return this card to your hand (from play) → choose: • Deal 1 damage to an enemy. • Daredevil gains the [[AERIAL]] trait until the end of the round.

card.name: The Man Without Fear
card.property: Hero Action: Exhaust this card and deal 1 damage to Daredevil → choose: • Choose any upgrade from the [[SENSE]] deck and play it, ignoring its resource cost. (Do not shuffle.) • Ready Daredevil.

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Genius. Martial Artist.

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Response: After Blindspot thwarts, confuse an enemy with an upgrade attached.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I'm invisible, but I'm still here. Chinatown is where I live and I'm going to protect it."

card.name: Cloak
card.property: Action: Exhaust Cloak and spend [energy][energy] resources → find Dagger and put her into play. [acceleration]

card.name: Dagger
card.property: Cloak loses each [acceleration] icon. [star] If Cloak is in play, Dagger takes -1 consequential damage after she uses a basic power.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I'll be the light in your dark, Ty."

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Midnight Sun.

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Interrupt: When Ghost Rider attacks an enemy, spend a [lightning] resource ([lightning][lightning] resources instead if that enemy is the villain) → confuse that enemy.

property.name: Quote
property.value: My penance stare reveals all of your past sins!

card.name: Know Your Enemy
card.property: [star] Discount 1 ([[MARTIAL ARTIST]]). Hero Action (thwart): Remove 1 threat from a scheme. Remove 1 threat from a scheme.
"I don't need to see you to know your next move." -Iron Fist

card.name: Chance Encounter
card.property: Attach to a side scheme. Max 1 per scheme. Interrupt: When attached side scheme is defeated, search your deck and discard pile for an ally and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

card.name: Legal Trouble
card.property: [star] Discount 1 ([[ATTORNEY]] or [[POLICE]]). Attach to a minion. Max 1 per minion. Attached minion gets -2 SCH.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "You got a permit for that?"-Police officer

card.name: Move In Shadow
card.property: Discount 1 ([[MARTIAL ARTIST]] or [[SPY]]). Temporary. Max 1 per player. Response (thwart): After you play a card (including this one), remove 1 threat from a scheme.

card.name: Stealth Training
card.property: Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player. Response: After you thwart and exactly defeat a side scheme, exhaust Stealth Training → stun an enemy.

card.name: Stick

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Martial Artist. Persona.

card.property: Interrupt: When a friendly [[MARTIAL ARTIST]] character uses a basic power, choose: • Exhaust Stick → that character gets +1 to that basic power for this use. • That character gets -1 to that basic power for this use. Ready Stick.

card.name: Contingency Planning
card.property: Max 1 per player. You may play the upgrade tucked here as if it were in your hand. Action: Choose 1 upgrade in your hand that can attach to a minion or side scheme. Tuck that upgrade under here (to a maximum of 1).

card.name: Dance With The Devil
card.property: Team-Up (Daredevil and Elektra). Max 1 per deck. Attach to an enemy. Hero Action (attack): Discard this card → deal 3 damage to attached enemy.

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Defender. Martial Artist.

property.name: Text
property.value: Watch and Learn — Response: After a player plays an aspect or basic event, tuck that event under here from that player's discard pile. Then, if there are more than 3 tucked cards here, discard all but 3 of those cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Practice Makes Perfect — Interrupt: When you change to hero form, search your deck for an aspect or basic event and add it to your hand. (Shuffle.)

property.name: Quote
property.value: Maya can recreate any physical movement she sees.

card.name: Innate Reflexes
card.property: Starting. (You may add this card to your hand before drawing your starting hand.) Your hero gets +1 DEF.

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Defender. Martial Artist.

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] Response: After Daredevil uses a basic power, reduce the cost of the next event you play this round by 1.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Follow my lead."

property.name: Text
property.value: [star] If you are in hero form, you can discard Photographic Reflexes from your hand to play an event tucked under Echo as if it were in your hand. Reduce the cost to play that event by 2. You cannot trigger Echo's "Watch and Learn" ability for that event.

property.name: Text
property.value: Action: Search any player's discard pile for 1 aspect event, 1 basic event, or 1 copy of Photographic Reflexes and add that card to your hand.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I watch tape after tape to train for a fight." -Echo

property.name: Text
property.value: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust The Rez → heal X damage from Maya Lopez, where X is the highest cost among cards tucked under her.

property.name: Quote
property.value: The Rez is not a real reservation or Native nation, but a place for all tribes.

card.name: American Sign Language

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Resource: Exhaust this card → generate a [wild] resource for an event being played by any player.

card.property: <Need help?>"-Echo *Translated from ASL.

property.name: Text
property.value: Action: Exhaust this card → shuffle 1 aspect or basic event from your discard pile into your deck. If you are in alter-ego form, draw 1 card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Maya uses her physical gifts to express herself in dance.

card.name: Echo's Katana
card.property: Restricted. Hero Response (attack): After you play an event, exhaust Echo's Katana → deal damage to an enemy equal to that event's printed cost. This attack gains piercing.

card.name: Improvisation
card.property: Hero Response: After you play an event, if it has the following traits: • [[ATTACK]] - heal 1 damage from Echo. • [[DEFENSE]] - remove 1 threat from a scheme. • [[THWART]] - deal 1 damage to an enemy.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Action: Exhaust this card → add an event tucked under Echo to your hand.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I absorb an arsenal of actions, so when I need to, I can perform them with the same precision." -Echo

card.name: Army Of One
card.property: [star] Increase the cost to play this card by 1 for each ally you control. Hero Action: Ready your hero.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Two versus one is not a fair fight...for you." -Daredevil

card.name: Get Their Attention

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Defense. Thwart.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt (defense/thwart): When an enemy initiates an attack, remove 3 threat from a scheme.

card.property: "I think we made 'em mad." "What do you mean 'we'?" -Rocket Raccoon and Gamora

card.name: In Harm's Way

property.name: Attribute
property.value: ATTACK. THWART.

card.property: [star] Increase the cost to play this card by 1 for each ally you control. Hero Action (attack/thwart): Deal X damage to an enemy and remove X threat from a scheme, where X is your DEF.

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Attack. Defense.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt (attack/defense): When an enemy initiates an attack, deal 4 damage to that enemy.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "That was my favorite shirt!" -Luke Cage

card.name: The Best Offense...
card.property: Temporary. Your hero gets +1 DEF. Use your DEF in place of your THW and ATK. (Ignore any modifiers to your THW and ATK.)

property.name: Text
property.value: While you do not control any allies, your hero gets +1 DEF and gains retaliate 1.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I am Ronin, the samurai with no master." -Ronin

card.name: Stand Alone
card.property: Max 1 per player. Hero Interrupt: When an enemy attacks you (before any defender is declared), if you do not control any allies, exhaust Stand Alone → ready your hero.

card.name: See No Evil, Hear No Evil

property.name: Attribute
property.value: Attack. Thwart.

card.property: Team-Up (Daredevil and Echo). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack/thwart): Choose 2 of the following (you may choose the same option twice): • Deal 3 damage to an enemy. • Remove 3 threat from a scheme.

property.name: Text
property.value: Max 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Max 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Max 1 per deck.

card.name: Focus The Senses
card.property: Threat cannot be removed from this scheme except by Daredevil or Matt Murdock. When Defeated: You may move any number of [[SENSE]] upgrades in play to other cards they can attach to. Choose any number of upgrades from the [[SENSE]] deck and put them into play. (Do not shuffle.)

card.name: De-escalation
card.property: Victory 0. When Defeated: Remove an acceleration token from play.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "I can see my house from here!" -Civilian

card.name: Sensory Overload
card.property: Give to the Matt Murdock player. Forced Response: After a [[SENSE]] upgrade enters play, take 1 damage. Alter-Ego Response: After you recover, discard this card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Daredevil's heightened senses make him vulnerable to intense stimuli.

card.name: Bullseye
card.property: When Revealed: Choose: • Discard a [[PERSONA]] support you control. • Bullseye attacks you (even in alter-ego form).

property.name: Quote
property.value: "In my hands, anything is a deadly weapon!"

property.name: Text
property.value: Forced Interrupt: When Bullseye attacks, give him a facedown boost card.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "C'mon, Hornhead, let's give the people a show!" -Bullseye

card.name: Stolen Sai
card.property:
Attach to the enemy with the highest ATK. [star] Attached character's attacks gain piercing. Hero Action: Spend [physical] [physical] resources → choose to either attach this card to Elektra or discard it.
[star] Boost: If this activation is an attack, it gains piercing.

card.name: Eye On The Target
card.property: When Revealed: Choose: • Remove an ally or [[PERSONA]] support you control from the game. • Bullseye attacks you (even in alter-ego form). If he is not in play, find him and reveal him.

card.name: Superpower Training
card.property: Victory 0. When Defeated: Each player may search their deck and discard pile for an identity-specific upgrade and put it into play. (Shuffle.)
"Eat light daggers, you purple punk!" -Dagger

card.name: Raised By The Kingpin
card.property: Give to the Maya Lopez player. You cannot deal damage to Kingpin. When Revealed: Find Kingpin and put him into play engaged with you. Response: After you thwart, place that threat here. If there is 4 or more threat here, remove this card from the game.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Give to the Maya Lopez player.

card.name: Kingpin
card.property: Forced Interrupt: When Kingpin would attack the Maya Lopez player, he schemes instead. (Echo's nemesis minion.)

property.name: Quote
property.value: "In my own way, I grew to care for you, Maya. I loved you like a daughter. I still do."

card.name: Master Manipulator
card.property:
Kingpin cannot take damage. When Revealed: Find Kingpin and put him into play engaged with you.
[star] Boost: If Kingpin is in play, reveal this scheme.
"If you lay a hand on me, you will regret it." -Kingpin

card.name: Kingpin's Henchman
card.property: Guard. Kingpin cannot take damage.

property.name: Quote
property.value: "Mr. Fisk would like a word wit' yous."

card.name: Pawn Of The Kingpin
card.property: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): If Kingpin is in play, he schemes. Otherwise, this card gains surge. When Revealed (Hero): Deal damage to a hero equal to your hero's ATK.

property.name: Quote
property.value: Kingpin convinced Echo that it was Daredevil, not Kingpin, who killed her father.
